Did the firm buy a new office?
Good morning, Rafael. For our article, can you tell me how the firm started?
Of course. In 1998, two lawyers founded the firm with a single desk. In the first years, it grew slowly.
And when did the firm become bigger?
In 2005, we bought a new office and took over two local competitors. We built new departments and won our first award.
Impressive. And the recent merger, how did it change the company?
After the merger, the firm became one of the largest in the region. We opened offices in three countries.

Welcome to our company history tour. Let me tell you how it all began. In nineteen ninety-eight, two lawyers founded a small firm with only one room and a single desk. In the first years, the firm grew slowly, but it built a strong reputation in the city. In two thousand and five, it bought a smaller office and took over two local competitors. The team became one of the most respected in the region. In two thousand and twelve, the firm won a national award for legal excellence. Today, after a big merger, the company has offices in three countries. From one desk to three countries, this is our story.

When I joined this company, it was still small. I remember the year we won our first national client. Everyone worked hard, and slowly the firm grew. We built new departments, we bought better systems, and we became a real player in the market. The hardest moment was the merger. Two companies became one, and at first nobody knew the new rules. But we found a way. We kept our values, we took over the new offices with respect, and in the end the merger made us stronger. When I look at the timeline on the wall, I do not see only dates. I see the people who built every step.

First, in nineteen ninety-eight, two lawyers founded the firm with a single desk. Then, in the first years, the firm grew slowly and built a strong reputation. Next, in two thousand and five, it bought a new office and took over two local competitors. After that, the firm became one of the most respected in the region and won a national award. Finally, after a big merger, the company opened offices in three countries.
